learning_roadmap.title: Creative Concept & Scripting: {first_gap}
learning_roadmap.description: Develop original creative narrative or audio arrangement incorporating {first_gap} techniques.

learning_roadmap.title: Production & Recording: {second_gap}
learning_roadmap.description: Produce, film, or record digital content utilizing {second_gap} tools and techniques.

learning_roadmap.title: Release & Audience Engagement
learning_roadmap.description: Publish a mini creative portfolio project online, collecting audience feedback and tracking engagement metrics.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI generates title options, script outlines, and sound sample ideas.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human selects compelling themes, injects authentic personality, and curates taste.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI automates background noise removal, color grading, and automated captioning.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human owns narrative pacing, emotional timing, and final artistic direction.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI analyzes posting schedules and generates social media promotional text.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human builds genuine human connections, conducts live performances, and fosters community loyalty.

evolution_timeline.title: Emerging Artist / Content Creator
evolution_timeline.description: Develop artistic identity, publish initial creative works online, and master fundamental production tools.

evolution_timeline.title: Independent Creative Producer
evolution_timeline.description: Build a loyal audience base, collaborate with peer creators, and produce polished multi-media projects.

evolution_timeline.title: Established Creative Director
evolution_timeline.description: Direct major media campaigns, monetize creative intellectual property, and mentor upcoming artists.

future_self.headline: Future Creative / Media Producer
future_self.narrative: {name} can thrive by pairing distinct artistic expression with modern digital media production. While AI can speed up technical edits, true human taste, emotion, and storytelling remain irreplaceable.
future_resume_highlights: Produced and published a mini creative series related to {title}.
Demonstrated distinctive artistic storytelling and audience engagement growth.
Leveraged modern digital audio/video tools to ship polished creative assets.

risk_heatmap.description: AI can generate generic music and visuals, but authentic human identity and storytelling command premium value.
Production software updates frequently, but core principles of melody, storytelling, and emotion are timeless.
Digital platforms make entry easy; standing out requires persistent personal branding and unique taste.
Audience connection relies on authenticity, original perspective, and personal trust.
